## 🚨 Security Vulnerability Reporting

Please **DO NOT** open public issues or pull requests for security vulnerabilities. This is critical as this project manages shell access and local git worktrees. 

### How to report
To report a security vulnerability, please refer to the instructions in our `SECURITY.md` file located at the root of this repository.

Generally, you can reach out directly via email to the maintainer: [hugolsramos01@gmail.com](mailto:hugolsramos01@gmail.com).

Please include the following details in your report:
- Description of the vulnerability.
- Steps to reproduce.
- Potential impact and exploitation scenario.

We take security seriously and will respond as quickly as possible.
